title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi, secured a $108M Series A by rebuilding the insurance industry from the ground up rather than modernizing legacy carriers. The company prioritizes the most ambitious version of its vision and has achieved significant traction through relentless execution over two years despite regulatory challenges.
